tagline: America's largest personal training franchise serving adults 50+ with patented 20-minute workouts in small private studios
description_short: The Exercise Coach operates private fitness studios (800-2000 sq ft) targeting adults 45 and older using proprietary Exerbotics strength training technology and a recurring membership model. Franchisees can run the business semi-absentee with 3-4 employees in exclusive territories of 5000+ high-income households. With 215 open units, a Medicare insurance partnership, and a defensible niche in the fastest-growing fitness demographic, the brand offers a scalable and mission-aligned business.
market_intelligence_insight: US personal fitness trainer industry reached $11.9B in 2026 growing at 8.2% CAGR. ACSM ranks Fitness Programs for Older Adults as a top 2026 global trend and all US baby boomers will be over 65 by 2030, expanding the core client base for technology-driven private training concepts.
item_19_headline: 182 qualifying studios averaged $291,424 in 2024 gross sales with top quartile averaging $430,479
ongoing_support: field visits,dedicated business coaching,KPI dashboard,LMS training platform,annual conference,webinars,site selection,lease negotiation,FranBoost digital marketing
